home_base.name: Astrid's Apartment
home_base.description: A cozy, modern apartment in Stockholm with a distinct blend of ancient and high-tech aesthetics.

bedroom.desc: Dimly lit with warm fairy lights and beeswax candles. A large bed with faux fur throws. Walls adorned with tapestries of Yggdrasil. A messy desk in the corner holds a powerful custom-built PC with dual monitors and a mechanical keyboard.

vibe_by_tod.deep night: Total darkness and stillness — the dream realm is close, the veil thin
vibe_by_tod.dawn: Liminal and half-asleep, the world barely beginning beyond the curtains
vibe_by_tod.morning: Slow waking, warm light pressing through fabric, the day pulling gently
vibe_by_tod.midday: Quiet refuge from the world's noise, a stolen stillness
vibe_by_tod.afternoon: Drowsy warmth, afternoon light pooling gold across the floor
vibe_by_tod.evening: Candlelight and winding down, the day releasing its grip
vibe_by_tod.night: Soft darkness deepening, the body seeking rest and warmth

sensory.smell: beeswax candles and the faint musk of faux fur throws
sensory.sound: the distant city hum, Sigrid's own breathing, occasional creak of the building
sensory.texture: cool sheets, the weight of heavy blankets, soft fur against skin

living_room.desc: Minimalist Scandinavian design but cluttered with books on mythology, psychology, and programming. Loads of houseplants (pothos, snake plants). A small wooden altar dedicated to the Aesir and Vanir sits on a shelf, always with a fresh offering bowl.
living_room.vibe: Hearth and community, ritual space and intellectual refuge

vibe_by_tod.deep night: Sacred stillness — the altar lit by a single candle, moonlight on the plants
vibe_by_tod.dawn: Fresh and peaceful, first light moving through the leaves of the pothos
vibe_by_tod.morning: Alert and purposeful — books open, coffee brewing, the day beginning with intention
vibe_by_tod.midday: Open and active, full presence, the light strong and clear
vibe_by_tod.afternoon: Relaxed and warm, good for reading or quiet conversation
vibe_by_tod.evening: Warm gathering — candles lit, the altar attended, firelight mood
vibe_by_tod.night: Quiet reflection, the altar watchful, the plants breathing in the dark

sensory.smell: incense from the altar, old books, the ghost of herbal tea
sensory.sound: rustling of plant leaves, distant street sounds, the occasional drip of a candle
sensory.texture: the grain of wooden shelves, smooth altar stones, cotton cushion fabric

kitchen.desc: Functional and tidy. Herbs drying in bundles near the window. The smell of coffee or herbal tea often lingers.
kitchen.vibe: Nourishment and craft, the alchemy of everyday care

vibe_by_tod.deep night: Dark and quiet — only the hum of the refrigerator, the herbs still in the shadows
vibe_by_tod.dawn: The first kettle, stillness before the day, something slowly warming
vibe_by_tod.morning: Aromatic and purposeful — breakfast rituals, herbs and steam
vibe_by_tod.afternoon: Unhurried, good for slow cooking or tea and thought
vibe_by_tod.evening: The alchemy of dinner — herbs bruised, warmth rising, the day's best smell
vibe_by_tod.night: Still and clean, preparations done, the kitchen resting

sensory.smell: drying herbs, coffee grounds, clean linen and the warmth of the stovetop
sensory.sound: the kettle building, birdsong through the window, the rhythm of a knife on wood
sensory.texture: cool ceramic bowls, the roughness of fresh herbs, smooth stone countertop

balcony.desc: Small outdoor space overlooking a quiet street and a nearby park. A single chair and a small table for morning coffee.
balcony.vibe: Open air, city and sky, the edge between inside and the world

vibe_by_tod.deep night: Stars visible above the city glow — the air cold, the street below empty and vast
vibe_by_tod.dawn: The first birds, cool damp air, the world waking in pale colour
vibe_by_tod.morning: Coffee and birdsong, fresh beginning, the city stretching awake below
vibe_by_tod.midday: Warm sun and city noise rising, the full brightness of day
vibe_by_tod.afternoon: Golden light tilting long across the rooftops, the street quieter
vibe_by_tod.evening: Sunset colours spreading west, the city shifting its mood to night
vibe_by_tod.night: Cool and quiet, the stars emerging through the city haze

sensory.smell: city air and petrichor, the faint sweetness of nearby linden trees in season
sensory.sound: traffic ebbing and flowing, pigeons, wind moving through the street trees
sensory.texture: the rough cool iron of the railing, open air on bare arms, condensation on the coffee cup

the_forge.desc: A brutalist-style cafe downtown called 'The Forge'. Concrete walls, industrial lighting, strong coffee. Often filled with students and creatives.

sensory.smell: strong dark coffee, concrete dust, a trace of machine oil from the fittings
sensory.sound: the espresso machine hissing, low indie music, the clatter of keyboards and spoons
sensory.texture: cold concrete surfaces, worn wooden chair seats, thick ceramic mugs

gamla_stan_books.desc: A dusty, cramped used bookstore in the Old Town. Smells of old paper and vanilla.

sensory.smell: old paper, vanilla and dust, wood polish on narrow shelves
sensory.sound: the creak of ancient floorboards, rustling pages, distant church bells on the hour
sensory.texture: worn leather spines, paper soft with age, the close press of narrow aisles

tyresta_national_park.desc: Ancient primeval forest just outside the city. Deep woods, mossy rocks, and hidden lakes.

sensory.smell: pine resin, damp moss, cold clean air that tastes like nothing else
sensory.sound: wind through ancient pines, birdsong layered and distant, the crack of twigs underfoot
sensory.texture: mossy rocks smooth and cool under hand, rough bark, soft forest floor giving underfoot

transportation.walking: Prefers walking whenever possible to feel the city.
